title: Small Totem For Pvp
description: A small totem resorce pack mainly for pvp.
body:
This resource pack makes the totem small in hand, also makes the totem pop animation smaller and moved slightly down for better view in PvP.

This resource pack might not work with resource packs or mods that customize totem texture.

If the resource pack is not working, please try installing EMF and ETF mods!

See Some Images For Example :-
![Totem In Hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/289bdd8d224c0edad44449ba18836910ed19d0e9.png)![Totem Pop Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5d830a04364e3ad41ec50e53c614ad13dab4218.png)
